auth.label: API Token
auth.description: Keygen API token sent with the Authorization Bearer header. Generate an environment or product token from the Keygen dashboard or token API: https://keygen.sh/docs/api/authentication/

extraFields.label: Account ID or Slug
extraFields.description: The Keygen account UUID or slug used in /v1/accounts/<account>. Find it in Account Settings under Current Account: https://keygen.sh/docs/api/#your-keygen-account
